name: Pancakes with Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, heat the butter and fry onions until golden.
2. Add mushrooms and 2 tablespoons water to the skillet; cover and cook on low heat for 5 minutes.
3. Soak the bread in water, squeeze out excess water.
4. Grind everything together with salt and pepper until creamy.
5. Spoon a little of the mixture into the center of each pancake and fold the pancakes envelope fashion to encase the filling completely.
6. Roll each stuffed pancake in leftover batter and bread crumbs.
7. Fry in hot butter until golden on both sides.
Yields 15 pancakes.
